hero.headline: Concrete work that *outlasts the weather*
hero.subheadline: From driveways to foundations — poured right the first time in Huntington

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: Concrete & Dirt Work
services_section.subheading: Every pour, every cut, every grade — handled

services.title: Driveways & Walkways
services.description: New concrete driveways and walkways that handle West Virginia weather. Proper base prep, steel reinforcement when needed.

services.title: Foundation Work
services.description: Residential and commercial foundations. Footers, slabs, and basement walls poured to spec.

services.title: Site Excavation
services.description: Dirt work for new construction. Site prep, grading, and utility trenching with proper equipment.

services.title: Concrete Repair
services.description: Crack repair, resurfacing, and concrete replacement. Fix settling slabs and damaged sections.

about.heading: Built for Huntington
about.body: We're a Huntington concrete team that shows up when we say we will. One call, one crew, one job done right.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving the Tri-State
service_areas.subheading: Concrete and excavation throughout the region

cta.heading: Ready to Pour?
cta.body: Get your free estimate today. No hidden fees, no surprises — just straight talk about your concrete project.
